claims.summary: Semantic decay should interpolate continuously between low- and high-fill windows.
claims.disposition: Verified sigmoid shaping plus smoothstep recovery handover.

claims.summary: The release band should remain monotonic without step loss.
claims.disposition: Verified one-percent sweep, epsilon, midpoint, and release-boundary tests.

claims.summary: The low-fill hold must remain exact while ordinary high-fill pruning stays bounded.
claims.disposition: Verified exact 45,000 ms hold and bounded high-fill floor.

claims.summary: Alternative sigmoid steepness or stale windows could change the felt handover.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because curve/window tuning changes live semantic retention.
